title: juncus bufonius var. genuinus
intro: Juncus bufonius var. genuinus, also known as the toad rush or marsh rush, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the genus Juncus. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Juncus bufonius var. genuinus include its ability to treat various conditions such as skin irritations, wounds, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and improve digestion. Herbal preparations of Juncus bufonius var. genuinus include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
